zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Constance De Leybourne於1320年出生在英國諾圖波藍德卡素時，她的父親Sir John Lilburne41歲，母親Constance Pontop57歲。她於大約1336年與Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年在加拿大亞伯達省紐維爾 庫迪 諾 4拉堂姆享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Constance De Leybourne于1320年出生在英国諾圖波藍德卡素时，她的父亲Sir John Lilburne41岁，母亲Constance Pontop57岁。她于大约1336年与Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年在加拿大亚伯达省紐維爾 庫迪 諾 4拉堂姆享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Constance De Leybourne was born in 1320, in Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir John Lilburne, was 41 and her mother, Constance Pontop, was 57. She married Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham about 1336. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1349, in Lathom, Newell County No. 4, Alberta, Canada, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Constance De Leybourne est née en 1320, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Lilburne, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Constance Pontop, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham environ 1336. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1349, à Lathom, Newell County No. 4, Alberta, Canada, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Constance De Leybourne 1320 in Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Lilburne 41 und ihre Mutter Constance Pontop 57. Sie hat um 1336 Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1349 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Lathom, Newell County No. 4, Alberta, Kanada.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Constance De Leybourneが1320年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Lilburneは41歳，母Constance Pontopは57歳であった。約1336年にAlan de Heaton Lord of Ellinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年にカナダアルバータ州ニューエル コウントイ ノ. 4ラソムで29歳で死去した。

ko.Lathom & Knowsley, Yorkshire, England, U: 캐나다 앨버타 뉴 카운티 노. 4 래톰
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Constance De Leybourne(이)가 1320년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Lilburne(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance Pontop(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1336년 Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 캐나다 앨버타 뉴 카운티 노. 4 래톰에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Constance De Leybourne nasceu em 1320, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Lilburne, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Constance Pontop, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham aproximadamente 1336. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1349, em Lathom, Newell County No. 4, Alberta, Canadá, com 29 anos.

ru.Lathom & Knowsley, Yorkshire, England, U: латом, нюелл коунти но. 4, Альберта, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Constance De Leybourne родилась в 1320 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Lilburne было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Constance Pontop, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham около 1336 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1349 г. в местности латом, нюелл коунти но. 4, Альберта, Канада в возрасте 29 лет.
